displayName: Air Attack is the damage this unit does to Air Units.
Health represents the constitution of the unit, and controls how easily this unit is defeated by enemy attacks. Higher Health units take fewer casualties.
Land Attack is the damage this unit does to Land Units.
Manpower is the number of human beings needed to supply one of these units. When a unit is destroyed in combat, the manpower inside of it dies as well.
Space Attack is the damage this unit does to Space Units.
Water Attack is the damage this unit does to Water Units.
